backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the service desk app, defining data types and CRUD operations for clients, jobs, parts, and labor rates, with access control, blob storage, and Stripe integration mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the frontend SettingsPage and useQueries hook were updated to compare the authenticated principal against the hardcoded owner principal string for local owner-check gating.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of short summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key changes of every page, component, and hook in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'Reliable Home Appliance Repair LLC Service Desk' and mounting the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines all TanStack Router routes and their corresponding page components, then renders the app via RouterProvider.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component with a sticky header, main content outlet, and a fixed bottom navigation bar; handles auth-based redirects to login or profile setup.
frontend/src/components/SignatureCapture: Reusable signature capture UI component that uses a canvas-based signature pad hook and saves the signature bytes to the backend, with Clear, Save, and Skip actions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an anonymous or authenticated actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, exposing identity state and status via a React context and custom hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for all backend CRUD operations (clients, jobs, labor rates, parts, user profiles, Stripe config, shopping items) using the actor from useActor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSignaturePad.ts: Implements a canvas-based signature pad hook supporting mouse and touch drawing, with methods to clear the canvas and export the signature as PNG bytes.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global CSS custom properties for the design system (colors, borders, sidebar, charts) in light and dark modes, plus Tailwind base/component/utility imports and safe-area utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CalendarPage.tsx: Renders a weekly calendar view of jobs with EST timezone support, displaying job cost summaries, status badges, and client location details with drag-and-drop-style layout.
frontend/src/pages/ClientDetailPage.tsx: Detail/edit page for a single client, supporting create, update, and delete operations with form fields for name, phone, address, email, notes, and Google review URL.
frontend/src/pages/ClientsPage.tsx: List page displaying all clients with search filtering, navigation to individual client detail pages, and a button to add new clients.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard overview page showing metric cards (job counts by status, total clients), recent jobs list, and labor rates summary, with owner-only visibility controls.
frontend/src/pages/InventoryPage.tsx: Inventory management page for parts, supporting search, inline add/edit/delete of parts with fields for name, part number, description, quantity, and unit cost, with low-stock warnings.
frontend/src/pages/InvoicePreviewPage.ts: Invoice preview page for a job that renders a printable/downloadable HTML invoice with labor line items, diagnostic fee, totals, and a signature pad for capturing and storing the technician's signature.
frontend/src/pages/JobDetailPage.tsx: Displays and manages a single job's details, including creating/updating/deleting jobs, adding/removing labor line items, and initiating Stripe checkout sessions for payment.
frontend/src/pages/JobsPage.tsx: Lists all jobs grouped and filtered by status (Open, In Progress, Complete), displaying each as a card with client name, date, and status badge.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Renders the login screen with Internet Identity authentication, redirecting authenticated users to the home page and showing loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupPage.tsx: Two-step onboarding page that collects the user's name and optionally captures a signature, then navigates to the home page on completion.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Settings page for managing labor rates (create, edit, delete) and configuring Stripe payment integration, with owner-only access controls.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, defining a dark-mode-enabled theme with custom OKLCH color tokens, fonts (Inter/Rajdhani), border radii, box shadows, keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state tracker (version 21) describing the ICP single-canister service desk app architecture, owner principal, existing features, known issues (owner privilege loss, signature screen), and incremental build notes for Reliable Home Appliance Repair LLC.
